prose: **Formaldehyde HOMO–LUMO gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, no density fitting) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied `.xyz` input file, not relaxed. SCF converged in 8 cycles. The headline result is the Koopmans-style orbital gap (difference between HOMO and LUMO energies): **5.8696712 eV**. Frontier orbitals reported: HOMO-2 through LUMO+2 energies and occupations tabulated above. Additional Koopmans-derived properties (ionization potential, electron affinity, electronegativity, hardness, softness, electrophilicity) also computed. Electronic energy: −114.55325 Hartree. Integrity: trustworthy. Command: `chemkit frontier --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 --accept-defaults /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/formaldehyde/formaldehyde.xyz`
